'''Anselme Miclyne''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] who served as a [[Technician/Legends|technician]] aboard the ''[[Hearst]]'', working for [[Freedom Galactic News]]. He was known among the rest of the crew for smoking [[Cigarra/Legends|cigars]].

{{Char-stub}}
